paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close, but a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The price data is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing Fermi's revenue and loss, as well as the company's expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year. The news item is dated July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms, with the most recent filing on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed, and a total of 25 filings.
